steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The question asks to emphasize a similarity between the two sculptures. This means the correct answer must highlight what both works share, not what distinguishes them.

steps.title: Apply the goal to the choices
steps.content:
A directly asserts that both Uras Horse and Golden Connection are LED light sculptures made by Grimanesa Amoros, establishing their shared characteristic.
  • B explicitly contrasts the two works
  • C only discusses one sculpture
  • D emphasizes their size difference
.

That is the correct answer.
